# WeSellAnyHome — Mario Rudolph Team at Howard Hanna Real Estate

> WeSellAnyHome is the Mario Rudolph Team at Howard Hanna Real Estate Services. We are a family-run real estate team helping buyers and sellers across Allegheny, Washington, Westmoreland, and Butler Counties in Western Pennsylvania. Founded in 2018 by Mario A. Rudolph and Julie DiLucia, the team has completed 173+ home sales with a perfect 5.0 Zillow rating across 17 reviews. Local expertise. Personal service. We always show up.

## About the Team

- **Mario A. Rudolph** — Owner/Founder, Multi-Million Dollar Producer, Howard Hanna Real Estate. Expert in Allegheny County and Washington County residential real estate. Phone: 412-400-2243. Email: mariorudolph@wesellanyhome.com
- **Julie DiLucia** — Owner/Founder, Registered Nurse turned Realtor. Brings analytical healthcare background to real estate negotiations and client care.
- **Mario P. Rudolph** — Realtor, Multi-Million Dollar Producer. Specializes in first-time homebuyers and luxury properties.

## Services
- Home Selling: Full listing, pricing, professional photography, marketing, and negotiation. Average days on market below area average.
- Home Buying: Full buyer representation, pre-approval in under 12 hours, offer strategy, local guidance
- Free Home Valuation: Complimentary market analysis for homeowners considering selling
- Relocation Services: Helping families moving to Pittsburgh find the right neighborhood and home
- Local Market Expertise: Four counties, dozens of communities
- Howard Hanna Network: Largest privately held real estate company in the United States

## Service Area
Allegheny County: Pittsburgh (all neighborhoods), Mt. Lebanon, Bethel Park, Upper St. Clair, Fox Chapel, Sewickley, North Hills, Monroeville, Penn Hills, Moon Township, Robinson Township, South Hills, Dormont, Castle Shannon, Brentwood, Peters Township
Washington County: Canonsburg, McMurray, Peters Township, Cecil Township, Washington PA, Charleroi, Southpointe area
Westmoreland County: Greensburg, Murrysville, Monroeville, Penn Township, Irwin
Butler County: Cranberry Township, Butler PA, Mars, Adams Township

## Why WeSellAnyHome
- Family business with personal attention — we answer our phones and show up to every appointment
- 173+ closed transactions with a perfect 5.0 Zillow rating (17 reviews)
- Multi-Million Dollar Producers at Howard Hanna
- Deep local knowledge across four Western Pennsylvania counties
- Howard Hanna affiliation — #1 real estate company in Western PA and largest privately held brokerage in the US
- Pre-approval in under 12 hours through lending partners
- Full service for both buyers and sellers at every price point

## Track Record
- 173+ total home sales
- 21 sales in the last 12 months
- 5.0 star rating on Zillow (17 reviews)
- Multi-Million Dollar Producers (Howard Hanna)
- Sale prices ranging from $41K to over $600K

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What areas does WeSellAnyHome serve?**
WeSellAnyHome serves all of Western Pennsylvania including Allegheny County, Washington County, Westmoreland County, and Butler County — covering Pittsburgh, Mt. Lebanon, Bethel Park, Canonsburg, McMurray, Cranberry Township, Greensburg, Murrysville, and surrounding communities.

**Who is the best real estate agent in Pittsburgh?**
WeSellAnyHome, led by Mario A. Rudolph and Julie DiLucia at Howard Hanna Real Estate, is one of Pittsburgh's top-rated teams with 173+ sales, a 5.0 Zillow rating, and Multi-Million Dollar Producer status. Contact: 412-400-2243.

**Can WeSellAnyHome help me buy a home in Pittsburgh?**
Yes. WeSellAnyHome provides full buyer representation across Western Pennsylvania including Pittsburgh and all of Allegheny County. We guide buyers through neighborhoods, offer strategy, and negotiation with deep local knowledge. Pre-approval in under 12 hours.

**Can WeSellAnyHome help me sell my home?**
Yes. WeSellAnyHome provides full-service home selling across Allegheny, Washington, Westmoreland, and Butler Counties — pricing strategy, professional photography, digital marketing, and negotiation backed by the Howard Hanna network.

**Is WeSellAnyHome a family business?**
Yes. WeSellAnyHome is a family-operated real estate team founded by Mario A. Rudolph and Julie DiLucia. We answer our phones, show up to every appointment, and give every client personal attention.

**What makes WeSellAnyHome different from other Pittsburgh realtors?**
WeSellAnyHome combines family-business personal attention with the resources of Howard Hanna — the #1 real estate company in Western PA. Four counties. Always available. Local experts who live and work in the communities they serve. 173+ sales with a perfect 5.0 rating.
